symptoms.symptom_name: Annular scaly advancing-border plaques with central clearing, expanding

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Annular scaly advancing border with central clearing is characteristic of tinea corporis.
Annular clearing morphology and afebrile state argue against cellulitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mechanical bleeding from scratching; no cellulitis/systemic features

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bleeding is mechanical; no induration/honey crust/fever.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Tinea is clinical; scraping if uncertain.
